field_guide.level: Level of the stack. Must match scope.
field_guide.trace: Observable evidence, explanation, or source summary.
field_guide.time: UTC timestamp of the recorded event.
field_guide.derived_from: List of higher-level event IDs from which this event derives.
field_guide.impact_vector: List of affected dimensions such as cybersecurity, economy, mobility, identity, governance.
field_guide.confidence: Confidence level of the event description: low, medium, high.

rules: decision, cost, trace, and time are mandatory
derived_from may be empty only for top-level events
impact_vector should contain at least one dimension
confidence should be low, medium, or high
notes: Operational template for adding new REP Reality Stack events in a consistent daily format.
